Terms of Service

Last Updated: March 30, 2026

1. Agreement to Terms

By accessing or using 'Perfect Paw Match', you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to all of these terms, do not use the service.

2. Description of Service

'Perfect Paw Match' provides digital game content and download services. All features and content are subject to change at our discretion.

3. Intellectual Property

All content included on this site, such as text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of 'Perfect Paw Match' or its content suppliers and protected by international copyright laws.

4. User Responsibilities

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information and for all activities that occur under your account.

5. Disclaimer of Warranties

The service is provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis. We make no warranties, expressed or implied, regarding the operation or availability of the service.

6. Limitation of Liability

'Perfect Paw Match' shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use the service.

8. Payment Terms

Payment Method: Secure checkout powered by Stripe. All major credit cards accepted. Payments are processed securely via Stripe's prebuilt checkout interface.

10. Digital Rights

Digital Rights: All digital assets are professionally curated and licensed for entertainment purposes. Users are granted a non-exclusive license to use the content within the 'Perfect Paw Match' platform.

11. Contact Information

Questions about the Terms of Service should be sent to us at perfectgiftfind@gmail.com.


Contact: perfectgiftfind@gmail.com
